description_long: This is a pair of Nike Air sneakers, featuring a classic low-top silhouette with a predominantly white and black color scheme. The shoes have a smooth leather upper with black overlays and white panels, accented by a prominent white Nike Swoosh on the side. The lacing system uses white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue displays a black and white Nike Air logo patch. The midsole is white with the word 'AIR' embossed on the lateral side, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The overall construction suggests a comfortable, cushioned fit suitable for urban environments, with visible branding and a clean, new appearance.
description: A pair of Nike Air sneakers in black and white, featuring leather uppers, white laces, and prominent Nike branding. The shoes appear new and are designed for comfort and style in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box, white laces, and Nike Air logo on the tongue; left shoe is mostly in shadow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white Nike Swoosh, black overlays, and 'AIR' text on the midsole; left shoe is in shadow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'NIKE AIR' logo on the heel tab of the right shoe; left shoe is mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lateral profile and lacing; left shoe is in shadow.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on the side panels, 'NIKE AIR' text on the heel, and a black-and-white Nike Air patch on the tongue.
